dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, someone is choosing to give everything they have for something bigger than themselves. And they need help to make that sacrifice count.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: Since {quest_origin}, {quest_threat} has been bearing down on us. The defenders at {quest_focus} know what's coming and they've accepted it. They need someone to {quest_action}, and {quest_item} {location_hint} could make the difference between their sacrifice buying hours or buying days.
dialogueChunks.outro: Every hour matters for {quest_stakes}. Those people chose their oath over their own safety. Don't let that choice be wasted.

playerResponses.text: I won't let them die for nothing. I'll help.
They can't hold. Focus on what can still be saved.
I'm not walking into a last stand.

dialogueChunks.intro: They burned everything at {quest_focus} and called it dangerous. The person who protected it vanished the same night, {player_name}.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: What they don't know is that copies were hidden at {quest_origin} before the fires started. Someone risked everything to preserve {quest_stakes} rather than themselves. {quest_threat} is closing in, and someone needs to {quest_action} before the hiding spot is found. {quest_item} {location_hint} might still be recoverable.
dialogueChunks.outro: The sacrifice was made to protect something worth protecting. It would be a tragedy if that sacrifice was wasted. {quest_reward_hint} might come of it.

playerResponses.text: What they protected matters. Point me in the right direction.
If I'm caught, it's my neck too.
I don't need that kind of trouble on my trail.

dialogueChunks.intro: Someone locked themselves in with the people who need help and won't come out until the job is done or they're gone, {player_name}.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: They sent a list of what they need: {quest_item}, supplies, basics. But nobody will go near {quest_focus} because of {quest_threat}. They know the risk. They chose the oath they swore over their own safety. If we don't {quest_action} soon, {quest_stakes} will suffer.
dialogueChunks.outro: They can save those people, but not without help from someone brave enough to get close. {quest_time_pressure}.

playerResponses.text: They're braver than anyone I know. I'll get them what they need.
What's to stop the danger from spreading to me?
